case_title: RONALD LEAK VS. FIRST AFRICAN METHODIST EPISCOPAL ZION CHURCH OF et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS FIRST AFRICAN METHODIST EPISCOPAL ZION CHURCH OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND LEROY HOGG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 501, THE REAL PROPERTY COURT, TO BE HEARD ON JANUARY 17, 2014. (SEE SFLR 8.10.) MOVING PARTY IS GIVEN THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6C. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPERATIVE PLEADING TO DEPARTMENT 501, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN DECEMBER 18, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE DEMURRER WILL BE OVERRULED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: TONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2014 Set For Trial On Sep-02-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-17-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No Appearance by the moving party.
Attorney John Melia (415-504-2165)for Plaintiff Ronald Leak the opposing party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT FIRST AFRICAN METHODIST EPISCOPAL ZION CHURCH amd LEROY HOGG's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges continuing violations up to August 19, 2013. While Plaintiff's recovery may be limited by the applicable statutes of limitations, Plaintiff's complaint filed on September 27, 2013 is not barred. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges IIED cause of action. Cause of action for UCL violation seeking restitution is sufficiently alleged. Defendant's argument regarding nuisance cause of action is not supported by any authority. Order signed and filed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-17-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No Appearance by the moving party.
Attorney John Melia (415-504-2165)for Plaintiff Ronald Leak the opposing party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT FIRST AFRICAN METHODIST EPISCOPAL ZION CHURCH and LEROY HOGG's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is DENIED. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges oppression and conscious disregard of his rights. Order signed and filed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-18-2013 Continued To Jan-17-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS FIRST AFRICAN METHODIST EPISCOPAL ZION CHURCH OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO and LEROY HOGG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS Transferred to Department 501, the Real Property Court, to be heard on January 17, 2014. (See SFLR 8.10.) Moving party is given the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6C. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the operative pleading to Department 501, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than December 18, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the demurrer will be overruled. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-18-2013 Continued To Jan-17-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS FIRST AFRICAN METHODIST EPISCOPAL ZION CHURCH OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO and LEROY HOGG'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS Transferred to Department 501, the Real Property Court, to be heard on January 17, 2014. (See SFLR 8.10.) Moving party is given the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6C. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the operative pleading to Department 501, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than December 18, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185
